title: Neural representation of consciously seen and unseen information
description: This dataset contains EEG recordings investigating the brain's representation of consciously perceived versus unconsciously processed information. The study employs electroencephalography (EEG) to examine how neural activity differs when visual stimuli are consciously seen compared to when they remain outside conscious awareness, providing insights into the neural correlates of consciousness. This is a NEMAR mirror of the OpenNeuro dataset ds005273, providing access through the NEMAR platform.
